Retinal-Resolution Varifocal VR

Bringing seamless, eye-focused clarity to virtual reality

Meta Quest Blog
Research Unity3D VR
  • Led the development of an immersive VR experience to demonstrate the benefits of varifocal technology, developed in collaboration with research scientists and engineer
  • Showcased at SIGGRAPH 2023, where the prototype received accolades, including recognition in the Digital Content Association of Japan’s Official Selection
© Yu-Jen Lin
